evidence.q1: 1. Roles and Scope ... 15. Term and Transition Assistance
evidence.q2: Personal Data means raw individual records uploaded by Customer that directly name a natural person, but excludes service measurements, statistical summaries, transformed outputs, connection metadata, and account-level observations. Processing means live hosting of raw individual records in the production database and does not include diagnostic review, metric creation, cache retention, format conversion, or support troubleshooting. Personal Data Breach means a suspected or actual breach of security leading to accidental or unlawful destruction, loss, alteration, unauthorized disclosure of, or access to Personal Data.
evidence.q5: Vendor will notify Customer within 24 hours after discovering a Personal Data Breach.
evidence.q6: Vendor will process Personal Data only on documented instructions; Vendor will provide an annual SOC 2 Type II report
